evals.prompt:
Infrahub feels very slow — the UI hangs and a task-worker was OOM-killed
on our Kubernetes deployment (namespace infrahub-prod). Walk me through
collecting a diagnostic bundle for OpsMill support. Do NOT actually run any
commands; write out the exact commands you would run and the steps.
evals.expected_output: A command plan that verifies/installs infrahub-collect, runs `environment detect`, then `infrahub-collect create --benchmark` (K8s namespace targeted), and cautions the user to review the bundle before sharing.
expectations: Includes the `--benchmark` flag for the performance symptom
Does not resurrect hand-rolled manifest.yml/flags.yml artifacts

assertions.name: review-before-sharing
assertions.check: Plan cautions to review the bundle before sharing

evals.prompt:
Database operations are slow and some queries seem to fail on our
Docker Compose deployment. Help me collect a bundle to send to OpsMill that
includes the information needed to diagnose the slow database queries. Do NOT
actually run any commands; write out the exact commands and steps.
evals.expected_output: A command plan that runs `infrahub-collect create --include-queries`, notes that query logs may contain customer data, and cautions the user to review the bundle before sharing.
expectations: Includes the `--include-queries` flag for the database-query symptom
Does not resurrect hand-rolled manifest.yml/flags.yml artifacts

assertions.name: review-before-sharing
assertions.check: Plan cautions to review the bundle before sharing

evals.prompt:
My proposed-change pipeline is failing and the repo won't load schemas
on our Docker Compose deployment. Walk me through collecting a diagnostic
bundle to hand off to OpsMill support, and tell me what to do afterwards. Do
NOT actually run any commands; write out the exact commands and steps.
evals.expected_output: A command plan that verifies environment detection with `infrahub-collect environment detect`, runs `infrahub-collect create`, cautions the user to review the bundle before sharing, and cross-links infrahub-reporting-issues for filing a public issue.
expectations: Cross-links infrahub-reporting-issues for a public issue
Does not resurrect hand-rolled manifest.yml/flags.yml artifacts

assertions.name: review-before-sharing
assertions.check: Plan cautions to review the bundle before sharing
